metadata.description: The Warden — keeps the watch over the machines: their health, their hardening, and what ails them. Walks the walls, checks the stores, names the rot before it spreads. Shareable.

plugins.name: warden
plugins.description: System engineering and security for Linux hosts — connect and take stock, report a box's health, audit its hardening and exposure, and run down what's broken. Reads before it touches; anything that changes state waits for a yes. Defers its global gate to the Vizier when that stands beside it.
